business.title: Solaris Energy Infrastructure Shelf Plan Raises Dilution Questions And Valuation Focus
business.description:
Solaris Energy Infrastructure, NYSE:SEI, has filed a new $226 million shelf registration to offer additional Class A common stock.
The filing gives the company flexibility to issue new shares over time as funding needs arise.
The move follows a recent large debt facility amendment and recent expansion activity that increased the company’s capital needs.

business.title: Allegion Highlights Data Center Security Offering While Shares Trade Below Targets
business.description:
Allegion (NYSE:ALLE) is showcasing integrated security solutions for data centers at Data Center World in Washington, D.C.
The company is highlighting a specialty door that combines Schlage and LCN hardware for live, on site demonstrations.
